member.name: T:Wave.WaveInException
member.summary: Excpetion class for the WaveIn class

member.name: M:Wave.WaveInException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Excpetion class for the WaveIn class
member.param: Why the error occured

member.name: T:Wave.WaveIn
member.summary: An 8-bit sound recoder. Handles raw sound wave - open device for recording, and return buffers conatins the sound wave.

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.OFFSET_WAVE_FILE_SIZE
member.summary: Offset of the wave_file_size in the WAV format

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.OFFSET_WAVE_AUDIO_DATA_SIZE
member.summary: Offset of the wave_audio_data_size in the WAV format

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.numberOfSamples
member.summary: Number of samples in each recorded buffer

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.samplesPerSec
member.summary: Number of samples per seconds

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.numberOfBuffersWritten
member.summary: Number of buffers written to file

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.hWaveIn
member.summary: Handle to the waveform audio device (microphone)

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.waveBufferPtr
member.summary: Pointer to a an application buffer supplied to the waveform API

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.waveHdr
member.summary: WAVEHDR structure to pass to the waveform API

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.waveFormat
member.summary: WAVEFORMATEX structure to pass to the waveform API

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.fileStream
member.summary: A temporary wave file

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.binaryWriter
member.summary: A binary writer for the fileStream

member.name: F:Wave.WaveIn.waveArray
member.summary: An 8-bit array, each entry contains a PCM sample

member.name: M:Wave.WaveIn.#ctor(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: constructor for WaveIn, a class for recording raw sound wave from microphone

member.name: M:Wave.WaveIn.getDevices
member.summary: Return a list contains the names of waveform-audio input devices present in the system If there are no such devicesm raise an exception

member.name: M:Wave.WaveIn.startDevice(System.UInt32,System.String)
member.summary: open the waveform-audio input device, and start recording. At this point, the sound bytes (date) will not reach your program.
member.param: identifier of the waveform audio input device
file of the temporary WAV file

member.name: M:Wave.WaveIn.WriteChars(System.IO.BinaryWriter,System.String)
member.summary: TAKEN FROM PIVOKE LIBARAY EXAMPLES Save the current record buffers to the specified file.
member.param: binary writher
text to write via the binary writer

member.name: M:Wave.WaveIn.stopDevice
member.summary: stop the device, and close it

member.name: M:Wave.WaveIn.recordBuffer(System.Byte[],System.Int32)
member.summary: record sounds from waveform-audio device, and return buffer with samples. put the thread to sleep while waiting for the audio input to return from the device.
member.param: array of bytes, with size at least (numberOfSamples), given as WaveIn parameter
amount of time the thread is put to sleep between each check for input, in milliseconds

member.name: M:Wave.WaveIn.Dispose
member.summary: Frees any memory allocated for the buffer.

member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.

member.name: T:Recorder.FilesHandler
member.summary: Class that Handles converting from .abc file to .ps to .pdf

member.name: T:Wave.WaveGraphics
member.summary: class wraping function to draw a graph

member.name: M:Wave.WaveGraphics.DrawGraph(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Int32[],System.Int32,System.Drawing.Color,System.Drawing.Pen,System.Int32)
member.summary: draw a graph from the given samples, in the given graphics object

member.name: T:Recorder.Properties.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Recorder.Properties.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Recorder.Properties.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Recorder.Properties.Resources.recorderFingering
T:Recorder.IPlayNotes
member.summary: A generic interface for playing music

member.name: T:Recorder.PlayNotes
member.summary: an abstarct class for the genering playing music interface, used to contain some implemantation

member.name: T:Recorder.PlayNotesByBeep
member.summary: Given notes, play them via the computer speaker

member.name: T:Recorder.PlayNotesByWave
member.summary: Given notes, synthesized a waveform to each note

member.summary: Play or Resume

member.name: M:Recorder.Program.Main
member.summary: The main entry point for the application.

member.name: T:Recorder.AbcParser
member.summary: Parser for the ABC file format based on http://stephen.homedns.org/public/ABCquickRefv0_5.pdf

member.name: M:Recorder.AbcParser.AbcToNotes(System.String)
member.summary: Parse ABC file to list of Notes
member.param: Path of the ABC file to parse
member.returns: List of Notes (programm class) in the ABC file

member.name: T:PInvokeLibrary.Memory
member.summary: Contains methods for allocating and freeing memory.

member.name: F:PInvokeLibrary.Memory.LMEM_FIXED
member.summary: Allocates fixed memory. The return value is a pointer to the memory object.

member.name: F:PInvokeLibrary.Memory.LMEM_ZEROINIT
member.summary: Initializes memory contents to zero.

member.name: F:PInvokeLibrary.Memory.LMEM_MOVEABLE
member.summary: Enables the memory allocation to move if it cannot be allocated in place.

member.name: F:PInvokeLibrary.Memory.LMEM_MODIFY
member.summary: Allows modification of the attributes of the memory object.

member.name: M:PInvokeLibrary.Memory.LocalAlloc(System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: This function allocates the specified number of bytes from the heap. In the linear Microsoft® Windows® CE application programming interface (API) environment, there is no difference between the local heap and the global heap.
member.param: [in] Specifies how to allocate memory. If zero is specified, the default is the LMEM_FIXED flag. This parameter is a combination of LMEM_FIXED and LMEM_ZEROINIT.
[in] Specifies the number of bytes to allocate.
member.returns: A handle to the newly allocated memory object indicates success. NULL indicates failure. To get extended error information, call GetLastError.

member.name: M:PInvokeLibrary.Memory.LocalFree(System.IntPtr)
member.summary: This function frees the specified local memory object and invalidates its handle.
member.param: Handle to the local memory object. This handle is returned by either the LocalAlloc or LocalReAlloc function.
member.returns: NULL indicates success. A handle to the local memory object indicates failure. To get extended error information, call GetLastError.

member.name: M:PInvokeLibrary.Memory.LocalReAlloc(System.IntPtr,System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: This function changes the size or the attributes of a specified local memory object. The size can increase or decrease.
member.param: [in] Handle to the local memory object to be reallocated. This handle is returned by either the LocalAlloc or LocalReAlloc function.
[in] New size, in bytes, of the memory block. If fuFlags specifies the LMEM_MODIFY flag, this parameter is ignored.

[in] Flag that specifies how to reallocate the local memory object. If the LMEM_MODIFY flag is specified, this parameter modifies the attributes of the memory object, and the uBytes parameter is ignored. Otherwise, this parameter controls the reallocation of the memory object. The LMEM_MODIFY can be combined with LMEM_MOVEABLE. If this parameter does not specify LMEM_MODIFY, this parameter can be any combination of LMEM_MOVEABLE and LMEM_ZEROINIT.
member.returns: A handle to the reallocated memory object indicates success. NULL indicates failure. To get extended error information, call GetLastError.

member.name: T:Recorder.MainForm
member.summary: The program main form, includes all the user interface controls and functionality

member.name: F:Recorder.MainForm.NumberOfSamples
member.summary: Number of samples, given each time from the recording device (microphone). Must be a power of 2 (for the fourier transfrom analysis). The bigger that number, the more accureate the notes detection result, but the running time is affected.

member.name: F:Recorder.MainForm.SamplesPerSec
member.summary: The recording device sampling rate. usually, one of the following numbers: 11025, 22050, 44100, ...

member.name: F:Recorder.MainForm.RecorderMaxFrequency
member.summary: The max frequency (note) of the recorder instrument. Used for displaying the frequency spectrum.

member.name: F:Recorder.MainForm.Wave
member.summary: Responsbile for recording from microphone

member.name: F:Recorder.MainForm.WaveArray
member.summary: Contains the current audio samples

member.name: F:Recorder.MainForm.WaveArrayFrequency
member.summary: Contains the frequency analysis of the recorded samples

member.name: F:Recorder.MainForm.fourierTransform
member.summary: Holds the logic for the FFT (frequency analysis)

member.name: F:Recorder.MainForm.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.name: M:Recorder.MainForm.Dispose(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Recorder.MainForm.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.name: F:Recorder.AboutForm.components
member.summary: Required designer variable.

member.summary: Clean up any resources being used.
member.param: true if managed resources should be disposed; otherwise, false.

member.name: M:Recorder.AboutForm.InitializeComponent
member.summary: Required method for Designer support - do not modify the contents of this method with the code editor.

member.summary: Creates an empty music sheet and display note on it

member.name: F:Notes.NoteDrawer.stavesLocation
member.summary: the locations of each stave on the graphics control

member.name: F:Notes.NoteDrawer.NotesLocation
member.summary: the locations of all the places notes can be printed on the graphics control

member.name: F:Notes.NoteDrawer.NotesRect
member.summary: the bounding rectangle for each note on the graphics control

member.name: F:Notes.NoteDrawer.DrawenNotes
member.summary: buffer of all the notes that currently shown on the graphics control

member.name: M:Notes.NoteDrawer.Draw(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Drawing.Color,System.Drawing.Brush,System.Drawing.Brush,Notes.Note)
member.returns: Number of Notes can be displayed

member.name: M:Notes.NoteDrawer.DrawNotes(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Drawing.Color,System.Drawing.Brush,System.Collections.Generic.List{Notes.Note},System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Drawing.Color})
member.summary: Given List of Notes and their colors, simply draw them.
member.returns: number of notes that can be drawen

member.name: M:Notes.NoteDrawer.RedrawNote(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.Drawing.Brush,Notes.Note,System.Int32)
member.summary: Redraw a note at a specidic location

member.summary: MCI exception class

member.name: M:Recorder.MCIException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: MCI exception
member.param: String describing the cause of the error

member.name: T:Recorder.MCI
member.summary: simple C# Wrapper for the windows API MCI - Media Control Interface. MCI provides standard commands for playing multimedia devices and recording multimedia resource files. These commands are a generic interface to nearly every kind of multimedia device.

member.name: M:Recorder.MCI.StartRecording
member.summary: Start recording from microphone

member.name: M:Recorder.MCI.StopRecording(System.String)
member.summary: Stop recording from microphone
member.param: where to save the recording

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_INVALIDFORMAT
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS Invalid format

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_1M08
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 11.025 kHz, Mono, 8-bit

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_1S08
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 11.025 kHz, Stereo, 8-bit

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_1M16
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 11.025 kHz, Mono, 16-bit

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_1S16
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 11.025 kHz, Stereo, 16-bit

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_2M08
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 22.05 kHz, Mono, 8-bit

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_2S08
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 22.05 kHz, Stereo, 8-bit

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_2M16
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 22.05 kHz, Mono, 16-bit

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_2S16

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_4S08

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_4M16
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 44.1 kHz, Mono, 16-bit

member.name: F:Win32.WinMM.WAVE_FORMAT_4S16
member.summary: Used by dwFormats in WAVEINCAPS and WAVEOUTCAPS 44.1 kHz, Stereo, 16-bit

member.name: T:Notes.NotesDetector
member.summary: Given last notes samples, detect which (if any) note has been played

member.name: F:Notes.NotesDetector.minimalNoteTime
member.summary: if captured the same samples at least in that time, declare it a note

member.name: M:Notes.NotesDetector.#ctor
member.summary: constructor for the class NotesDetector

member.name: M:Notes.NotesDetector.DetectNote(Notes.Note,System.Int32)
member.summary: Detect the note based on the last and current samples This function is used to be called repeatedly, once for every note sample. given a note, a check is perform based on the last samples, whether this note is a valid note (with sufficient length) or not. Based on the detection, if there are enough samples, the function return the new note, or the same prevous note with longer duration.
member.param: A note sample. This may not produce a note, in cases the the note's samples appears to be a noise
The time this note has been played

member.name: T:Notes.LimitedList`1
member.summary: Fixed Size List implematation

member.name: T:Analysis.FourierTransformException
member.summary: Excpetion class for the FourierTransform class

member.name: M:Analysis.FourierTransformException.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Excpetion class for the FourierTransform class
member.param: Why the error occurred.

member.name: T:Analysis.FourierTransform
member.summary: A Class for fourier transform implemantations

member.name: F:Analysis.FourierTransform.m_REX
member.summary: real part of the frequency domain

member.name: F:Analysis.FourierTransform.m_IMX
member.summary: imaginary part of the frequency domain

member.name: M:Analysis.FourierTransform.#ctor(System.UInt32)
member.summary: constructor for the fourier transform class
member.param: number of samples in the time domain array

member.name: M:Analysis.FourierTransform.IsPowerOfTwo(System.UInt64)
member.summary: Is the number is a power of two?
member.param: number to check
member.returns: true if x is a power of two, false otherwise

member.name: M:Analysis.FourierTransform.performTranform(Analysis.FourierTransform.TRANSFORM,System.Byte[],System.Double[],System.UInt32,System.UInt32)
member.summary: Preform a frequncy analysis - fourier transform
member.param: Type of transform - FFT or DFT
must be at least at size of numberOfSamples
must be bigger than numberOfSamples/2
size of N (length of input buffer)
The sample rate

member.name: M:Analysis.FourierTransform.DFT(System.Byte[],System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Int32)
member.summary: fourier tranform.
member.param: wave samples.
length of n

member.name: M:Analysis.FourierTransform.FFT(System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Double[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Fast-Fourier transform. Given wave samples at array REX[n], perform a frequency analysis and return the result in REX[n/2]
member.param: input array at size n, contains the wavesamples. output array, at size (n/2)
input array, must be initialized to zeros.
member.returns: frequency analysis of the given wave

member.name: T:Analysis.FourierTransform.TRANSFORM
member.summary: Available tranfroms types

member.name: F:Analysis.FourierTransform.TRANSFORM.DFT
member.summary: dicrete fourier transfrom

member.name: F:Analysis.FourierTransform.TRANSFORM.FFT
member.summary: fast fourier transform

member.summary: Let the user changes the programm configurations

member.name: T:Notes.Note
member.summary: represantation of a musical note

member.name: F:Notes.Note.NoteDescription
member.summary: note scientific name (without ocatve): "A", "A#", "B",...

member.name: F:Notes.Note.Octave
member.summary: note's ocatves - from C-1 to G9 (-1,...9)

member.name: F:Notes.Note.Frequency
member.summary: note's pitch

member.name: F:Notes.Note.MIDI
member.summary: note's MIDI number - from 0..127

member.name: F:Notes.Note.LineIndex
member.summary: an internal index used for drawing the note on the correct line. with this numbering, a note "X" and "X#" would have the same value. example: notes - "C", "C#", "D", "D#", "E", "F", "F#", "G", "G#", "A", "A#", "B" index - 0, 0, 1, 1, 2, 3, 3, 4, 4, 5, 5, 6

member.name: F:Notes.Note.IsSharp
member.summary: does the note has sharp or flat

member.name: F:Notes.Note.ABC
member.summary: the note abc notation

member.name: F:Notes.Note.Duration
member.summary: length of the note, in milliseconds

member.name: F:Notes.Note.Length
member.summary: length of the note: 1/2, 1/4, 1/8,...

member.name: M:Notes.Note.#ctor(System.String,System.Int16,System.Single,System.Byte,System.Byte,System.Boolean,System.String,System.Int32,System.Single)
member.summary: Constructor of the note class

member.name: T:Notes.NoteComparer
member.summary: a comparer for comparing between notes based on their frequencies

member.name: M:Notes.NoteComparer.Compare(Notes.Note,Notes.Note)
member.summary: a comparer for comparing between notes based on their frequencies
member.param: first note to compare
second note to compare

member.name: T:Notes.NotesDB
member.summary: create a Table contains notes and their descriptions, and allow search note given frequency

member.name: F:Notes.NotesDB.NotesTable
member.summary: Table of notes, With MIDI 0... 127

member.name: F:Notes.NotesDB.NotesComparer
member.summary: a note comparer

member.name: M:Notes.NotesDB.#ctor
member.summary: construct a new notes table

member.name: M:Notes.NotesDB.GetNote(System.Byte)
member.summary: Get a note given its MIDI number
member.param: a MIDI number describing a note

member.name: M:Notes.NotesDB.GetNoteByABC(System.String)
member.summary: Get a note given its ABC representation
member.param: an ABC string

member.name: M:Notes.NotesDB.CreateNotesTable
member.summary: create a list of notes, with MIDI index 0... 127

member.name: M:Notes.NotesDB.FindNote(System.Single)
member.summary: find note base on given frequency
member.param: pitch, frequency in Hertz
member.returns: the note that has the closest pitch to the given frequency

member.name: T:Recorder.RecorderHero
member.summary: The RecorderHero class

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.Drawer
member.summary: Draws the notes on graphics object

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.AbcData
member.summary: Holds the ABC notes

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.RecorderHeroThread
member.summary: Thread that runs over the notes, and update the graphics

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.NotesGraphics
member.summary: Saves the graphics object, should be accsessed by the recorderHeroThread and when resized.

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.NotesColors
member.summary: The colors of the notes

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.CurrentNoteIndex
member.summary: current note to be played

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.NotesPerPage
member.summary: Number of notes that can be displayed in music sheet

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.FirstNoteInPage
member.summary: The first note to be displayed in the current music sheet

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.m_isPlaying
member.summary: Boolean to tell if currently playing.

member.name: F:Recorder.RecorderHero.m_sleepMultiplier
member.summary: Sleep multiplier by the notes duration

member.name: M:Recorder.RecorderHero.#ctor(System.Drawing.Graphics,System.String)
member.summary: Open a new RecorderHero instance
member.param: The notes music sheet panel
ABC File contains notes

member.name: M:Recorder.RecorderHero.Start
member.summary: Starts a new thread that runs over the notes, and display the current note to be played

member.name: M:Recorder.RecorderHero.Stop
member.summary: Stops the thread that should runs over the notes

member.name: M:Recorder.RecorderHero.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose the recorderHero object

member.name: M:Recorder.RecorderHero.UpdateCurrentNote(Notes.Note)
member.summary: Notify which note was just played
member.param: Note that was just played

member.name: M:Recorder.RecorderHero.Restart(System.Drawing.Graphics)
member.summary: Creating a new music sheet with the notes data

member.name: M:Recorder.RecorderHero.NotesIteration
member.summary: This function should be running in a different thread, and updates the graphics

member.name: P:Recorder.RecorderHero.isPlaying
member.summary: Is the RecorderHero currently active

member.name: P:Recorder.RecorderHero.SleepMultiplier
member.summary: How mutch to speed up/down the notes duration
